posts.author: mitasale (mitasali)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey folks,

I am having a tough time getting the Jira integration to properly work with my Monday.com setup. I have tried setting it up multiple times, followed the steps in their help articles but it just won’t sync consistently. Some items update, some do not & occasionally it just throws a random error that does not explain much.

I am using Jira Cloud, in case that matters. Not sure if it is a permissions issue or something in the setup I am overlooking. It is been pretty frustrating while I am also prepping for my CCSP Training, so time is tight right now.

Has anyone faced this kind of issue & managed to get it working? Any advice would be awesome. Even a screenshot of how you mapped things would help a ton.

Appreciate any advice.
